overall.description: First-person walkthrough of Los Santos International Airport terminal in GTA V, moving from the covered exterior curb area into the terminal interior with digital signage and seating, ending at a stairwell descent.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under the airport terminal overpass

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure forming the ceiling of the covered walkway
thick white concrete pillars with green bands supporting the overpass
white modern terminal building wall with large windows
airport curb road with occasional vehicle traffic
white striped pedestrian crosswalk on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: Walking under the airport terminal overpass along the covered curb area. Concrete support pillars line the left side with a road visible beyond, while the terminal wall runs along the right. The ground is asphalt with painted crosswalk markings.

events.description: ground surface transitions from asphalt to tiled pavement marking the terminal entrance
passing digital signage and entering the main terminal concourse area

agents.ego_description: walking into the terminal entrance area passing ticket machines and digital signage

notable_agents.action: character sitting on blue bench with luggage nearby

entered.detail: illuminated circular KLM airline sign hanging from ceiling
grey self-service transit ticket vending machine
row of blue airport seating benches against the wall
large white spherical planters with greenery

segments.scene_description: Entering the terminal proper where the ground becomes tiled. Digital signage for KLM and terminal 4 hangs overhead. Blue seating benches and ticket machines appear on the right, with a seated passenger visible. The space becomes more enclosed with artificial lighting dominant.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal interior with LSIA signage

events.description: lighting becomes fully artificial as the camera moves deeper into the terminal interior away from natural light

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the terminal concourse past the LSIA sign and Bloomberg screen

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the terminal concourse

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign with white LSIA text
blue digital screen displaying Bloomberg logo
opening leading to stairs descending downward with red railings

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the terminal interior beneath the LSIA and Bloomberg digital signage. Large white planters with greenery line the walkway. The space is fully enclosed with artificial lighting, and a pedestrian walks ahead toward the stairwell entrance visible in the distance.

events.description: camera begins descending the stairwell with red railings

agents.ego_description: approaching and descending the stairwell leading down from the terminal concourse

entered.detail: red metal handrails lining both sides of the descending stairs
geometric maze-like pattern projected or painted on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering the stairwell at the end of the concourse. Red metal railings line the stairs descending downward, with a geometric maze pattern visible on the far wall. The LSIA signage and seating areas are left behind as the camera moves into the stairwell.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the covered exterior curb of the airport terminal into its brightly lit interior, ending with a descent into a stairwell. It begins under a concrete overpass, moving along an asphalt road marked with crosswalks and flanked by heavy support pillars. As the camera crosses the threshold into the terminal, the asphalt shifts to polished tiles and the natural light is replaced by artificial glow, passing under digital signage for KLM and Terminal 4 beside blue seating benches. The scene then expands deeper into the enclosed concourse, gliding past large white planters and Bloomberg displays while following a pedestrian toward the end of the hall. Finally, the camera leaves the open terminal area behind to enter a stairwell, moving past red metal railings and a geometric wall pattern as it descends downward.
